_comment: 选题/关键词队列。每个对象一个选题。脚本按 used=false 顺序取题，发布后自动置 used=true 并写回。你只需持续往 queue 里追加新选题即可。category 必须是 payment|esim|transport|essentials|food 之一。angle 可选，用于给生成器一个差异化切入角度。

queue.keyword: how to get from Beijing Daxing airport to city center
using Apple Pay and Google Pay in China as a tourist
queue.angle: what actually works vs what doesn't

queue.keyword: best food apps for ordering in China without Chinese
China eSIM vs roaming cost comparison 2026
queue.angle: real price breakdown for a 10-day trip

queue.keyword: what to pack for a first trip to China
taking the metro in Shanghai as a foreigner
how to tip and handle service charges in China
street food safety and must-try dishes in Chengdu
queue.angle: spice levels, hygiene, what to order
